name: andp-agent-pack
description: Generate the AI-Native Data Product Uderia Agent Pack from design standard documents. Produces a param-based Uderia skill + 7-profile agent pack (1 Genie coordinator + 6 llm_only module specialists) as a ready-to-import .agentpack file.
author: Rainer Geissendörfer, Worldwide Data Architecture Team, Teradata
use_cases: Generate the ANDP agent pack from design standard documents
Regenerate the pack after design standard documents are updated
Package AI-native data product design knowledge as a Uderia skill
Create the 7-profile ANDP agent pack for import into Uderia
